heading: Right of recovery in the case of certain marital deduction property
label: 2207A Right of recovery in the case of certain marital deduction property
notes: Amendments1997—Subsec. (a)(2). amended heading and text of par. (2) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “Paragraph (1) shall not apply if the decedent otherwise directs by will.”Pub. L. 105–34

children.heading: Recovery with respect to estate tax
children.label: a Recovery with respect to estate tax
A
children.text: the total tax under this chapter which has been paid, exceeds

children.label: B
children.text: the total tax under this chapter which would have been payable if the value of such property had not been included in the gross estate.

children.heading: Decedent may otherwise direct
children.label: 2 Decedent may otherwise direct
children.text: Paragraph (1) shall not apply with respect to any property to the extent that the decedent in his will (or a revocable trust) specifically indicates an intent to waive any right of recovery under this subchapter with respect to such property.

children.heading: Recovery with respect to gift tax
children.label: b Recovery with respect to gift tax

children.text: the total tax for such year under chapter 12, exceeds
the total tax which would have been payable under such chapter for such year if the value of such property had not been taken into account for purposes of chapter 12.

children.heading: More than one recipient of property
children.label: c More than one recipient of property
children.text: For purposes of this section, if there is more than one person receiving the property, the right of recovery shall be against each such person.

children.heading: Taxes and interest
children.label: d Taxes and interest
children.text: In the case of penalties and interest attributable to additional taxes described in subsections (a) and (b), rules similar to subsections (a), (b), and (c) shall apply.
